svg.font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.text: Agentic AI Endpoint Detection and Governance
Five-Layer Detection / Confidence-Scored Attribution / Class-Based Policy / Graduated Enforcement
Capability + risk surface = Class A, B, or C
Hard enforcement requires min. 2 aligned layers (at least one Process or Behavior) / Single-layer signal = Detect only
Inputs: confidence score / asset sensitivity (Tier 0-3) / actor trust (T0-T3) / action risk (R1-R4) / session history
macOS ES framework / Windows WDAC / Linux eBPF
SIEM export (JSON) / Compliance archive / Forensic recall
Tier 3 explicit-deny cannot score below S3
Agentic AI Endpoint Detection and Governance / Playbook v0.1 / Architecture Overview
